---
title: "Cookbook"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Cookbook

This page is a practical launch pad for common DPmixGPD tasks. Use it to pick a workflow path, then open the full walk-through pages.

[Start workflow series](workflows/v01-start-here.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Workflow roadmap](roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Open pkgdown articles](pkgdown/articles/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### First model in minutes
- Start at [Getting Started](getting-started.html)
- Then run [Introduction article](pkgdown/articles/introduction.html)
- Then follow [Workflow 1: Start Here](workflows/v01-start-here.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Unconditional modeling
- Bulk only: [Unconditional article](pkgdown/articles/unconditional.html)
- Bulk + tail: [Distributions article](pkgdown/articles/distributions.html)
- Workflow sequence: [v05-v09](workflows/v05-unconditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Conditional modeling
- Covariate-driven density modeling: [Conditional article](pkgdown/articles/conditional.html)
- Model setup details: [Model specification](pkgdown/articles/model-spec.html)
- Workflow sequence: [v10-v13](workflows/v10-conditional-DPmix-CRP.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Causal modeling
- End-to-end causal workflow: [Causal article](pkgdown/articles/causal.html)
- S3 outputs and plotting: [S3 methods reference](pkgdown/articles/reference-s3.html)
- Workflow sequence: [v14-v19](workflows/v14-causal-no-x-CRP.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Backend decisions
- Compare CRP vs stick-breaking: [Backends article](pkgdown/articles/backends.html)
- Structured choice support: [Decision Guide](decision-guide.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Diagnostics and checks
- MCMC process and diagnostics: [MCMC workflow](pkgdown/articles/mcmc-workflow.html)
- Frequently asked issues: [FAQ](faq.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where to go next

1. Use [Kernels](kernels.html) if you are uncertain about distribution family selection.
2. Use [Reference](reference.html) to jump directly to function docs.
3. Use [Workflow troubleshooting](workflows/v20-troubleshooting.html) if you are blocked.

:::
:::
